action.reasoning: Observation: Training ran for ~78 minutes but crashed at the very end due to JSON serialization error - numpy float32 isn't JSON serializable. The training likely completed multiple epochs and may have saved checkpoints. Analysis: The fix is simple - cast val_miou to Python float before JSON serialization. Need to check if checkpoints were saved during training. Decision: First check for existing checkpoints, fix the JSON bug, and if checkpoints exist, submit eval immediately. Otherwise retrain.
action.command: ls -la checkpoints/ && ls -la checkpoints/pretrained/ && find . -name '*.pt' -o -name '*.bin' -o -name 'model.safetensors' 2>/dev/null | head -20
